title: Timeless War
description: This is a modpack inspired by Timeless Adventures and used on a server. this is a multiplayer version that adds alot. Pheonixman1000 helped set up the pack (first change log will have all included mods)
body:
## Description :

this is a un-official version of Timeless Adventures Created By Pheonixman1000 he helped set up the pack. the included mods will be in the first update log. there are currently no horror mods but there is a ambiance mod.

This includes mods like TARDIS Refined, Adventures In Time, Create, most Create addons and Farmers delight.. theres alot of plane mods but too many to list

### Info :

Some versions will have Solas Shaders included. (depends if i forget it)

Forge Mods

[Simple Butchery](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-butchery/files/5070179)

[Copper & Tuff Backport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/copper-tuff-backport-fabric/files/5081431)
